Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Mmm, this is so good! I made the right choice getting the same thing as you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh, I was just thinking! Doesn't eating fish remind you of the ocean?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It's a part of our lives, I guess, living along the coast. We even spent our vacation at the beach.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Hey, after all this is over, why don't we go somewhere different, like the mountains?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We could have lunch outdoors. Maybe we'll even see a deer or something. What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_002_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's go just the two of us.{f 2 9 1 1 344}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}All right, then. I'll make us lunch![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I might not look like it, but I'm a pretty good cook! Just you wait and see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 7 5 2}Hmm, yeah, why not, right? It'll be like a reward for everyone's hard work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}All right, then. I'll make us lunch![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I might not look like it, but I'm a pretty good cook! Just you wait and see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Just the two of us...? I-I didn't mean it like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I mean, it's not that I don't want to! It's just... I'm not ready yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Either way, um... I'm sure it'd be fun to hang out somewhere together. I could even make food for us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I might not look like it, but I'm a pretty good cook! Just you wait and see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If you're worried about the lunch, I've got it covered![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I might not look like it, but I'm a pretty good cook! Just you wait and see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hehe, it's been a while since we've talked about going on vacation. I'm excited just thinking about it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I'm not sure how to say this, but... when I'm with you, {f 4 1}-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I mean, I do have friends... And there's everybody at the dorm, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Usually, I feel like the real me is trapped somewhere deep down inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Maybe it's because of my family situation, but... I'm always pushing people away without realizing it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Lately, though, that's been changing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is trusting in me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Well, that was delicious. It's getting late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
